hero.title: Narrate Geography, Paint Scenes
hero.subtitle: Online Creation · Material Sharing · Team Collaboration · Shared Browsing

feature1.title: Build Scenes Easily
feature1.desc: An online geographic scene editor that enables dynamic simulation of scenes in terms of time, location, characters, objects, events, phenomena, and other information elements. WYSIWYG editing experience lets your creativity land quickly.

feature2.title: Improve Review Efficiency
feature2.desc: Scenes built with the Geo-Scene Editor can be freely shared and browsed smoothly on the web. Supports multi-person collaboration and comments, making team communication more efficient.

productivity.title: Accelerate Your Workflow
productivity.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for professional geographic scene design

item1.title: AI Generation
item1.desc: Automatically generate terrain and scene elements via natural language descriptions.

item2.title: Real-time Collab
item2.desc: Support multi-person online editing with real-time sync for seamless teamwork.

item3.title: Multi-format Export
item3.desc: Support export to GLB, USDZ, and other common 3D formats for any renderer.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of creators and start building your first intelligent geographic scene.

notFound.subtitle: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: Sorry, the page you are looking for seems to be lost in the vast starry sky. Please check the link or return to the home page.

auth.loginDesc: Welcome back, please login to your account
auth.registerDesc: Create a new account to get started

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
